business.name: Sessoms Pro Services Soft Wash/Pressure Wash and Painting

hero.headline: *Clean like it matters* — because it does
hero.subheadline: No hidden fees, fair pricing, and work that stands up to Norfolk weather.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every surface gets the right treatment
services_section.subheading: From gentle soft washing to concrete power cleaning

services.title: Soft Wash House Cleaning
services.description: Low-pressure cleaning that removes mildew and algae without damaging siding or paint.

services.title: Gutter Cleaning & Repair
services.description: Complete gutter cleaning with minor repairs when needed. No surprise charges.

services.title: Driveway & Concrete Washing
services.description: High-pressure cleaning that removes oil stains, dirt, and buildup from concrete surfaces.

services.title: Exterior Painting Services
services.description: Professional painting for decks, fences, and exterior surfaces after pressure washing prep.

about.heading: Built on repeat customers
about.body: We're a Norfolk pressure washing team that shows up when we say we will. One call, fair pricing, no hidden fees.

reviews.name: Glenn B.
reviews.text: Ernest responded quickly with an upfront quote from photos. No hidden fees, fair price, and thorough work on my gutters.

reviews.name: Pam W.
reviews.text: Very professional and delivers the quality we expect. We'll continue calling him for any home projects.

reviews.name: rhonda r.
reviews.text: Had our home soft washed and driveway cleaned. Mr Sessoms takes pride in his work! Reasonable prices too.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Norfolk and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional washing services throughout Hampton Roads

cta.heading: Ready for that first call?
cta.body: Get your free quote today. Fair pricing, no surprises, work that lasts.
